{{Quote|The Sluis sector is a large expanse of sparsely populated space, renowned for its mineral resources and processing facilities. Its primary system, Sluis Van, maintains a formidable shipyard for construction and maintenance.|[[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]|<ref name="Hnn">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|news/13328_4.html|Sluis Sector Secedes; Seswenna Restates Loyalty}}</ref>}}
The '''Sluis system''' {{Pronounced|'slu.i}}, also known as the '''Sluis Van system''', was the central [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The system's primary [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]].

==History==
The system withdrew from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] to join the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Its [[Senator/Legends|senator]] at that time was [[Corlissi Ludar]].<ref name="Hnn" />

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], the system was the site of a [[Battle of Sluis Van|battle]] with [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] during his [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="HttE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The PC game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Sluis sector and, consequently, the Sluis system, in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]].<ref name="Rebellion">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref>
